calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Sandra E Mejia aka Sandra E Mejialuna aka Sandra E Luna aka Sandra M Luna an individual.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Reporter: Patty Dowling CSR#53388, email: pdowling@SFTC. org
Roger Jackson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express National Bank F/K/A American Express Centurion Bank
No appearance by defendant Sandra E Mejia.
Plaintiff's complaint for Open Book/Common Counts was filed on 5/10/2018 and personally served on defendant Sandra E Mejia on 5/13/2018.
Default as to defendant Sandra E Mejia was entered on 6/4/2019.
Doe defendants Dismissed in plaintiff's complaint and 2nd cause of action dismissed on 08/20/2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on 10/07/2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express National Bank FKA American Express Centurion Bank and against the default defendant Sandra E Mejia, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $6,736.60.
Costs - $435.

Total - $7,171.60.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Continued To Nov-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2019 Continued To Sep-24-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
